name: Stremio-HTTP
description: Aggregates streaming links from Stremio HTTP addons. Fires ALL addons in parallel for maximum speed and coverage. Dynamic quality extraction, URL validation, MAGIC_PROXY for reliable playback.
streamTitleTemplate: {if stream.resolution}{stream.resolution} {/if}{if stream.codec}{stream.codec} {/if}{if stream.audio}🔊 {stream.audio} {/if}{if stream.size}💾 {stream.size} {/if}{if stream.peers}👤{stream.peers} {/if}{if stream.seeders}🌱{stream.seeders} {/if}[{stream.addonName}]
